---
title: "Nestcamera Analysis"
author: "`r Sys.info()[['user']]`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Setup

Load libraries

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,results='hide'}
library(MonitoR)
```

Define Params and set path

```{r}
input_dir <- 'path2Files'
output_dir <- file.path(input_dir, 'renamed')
pattern <- 'JPG' 
prefix <- 'CameraID'
recursive = T
```


```{r, eval=FALSE}
rename_photo2datetime(
  input_dir = input_dir,
  output_dir = output_dir, 
  pattern = pattern, 
  prefix = prefix, 
  recursive = recursive)
```

## Analysis

```{r, results='hide'}
files <- list.files(input_dir, full.names = T, recursive = recursive, pattern = pattern)
```


A total of `r length(files)` photos were captured between `r exifr::read_exif(min(files), tags = "DateTimeOriginal")[["DateTimeOriginal"]]` and `r exifr::read_exif(max(files), tags = "DateTimeOriginal")[["DateTimeOriginal"]]`
